text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the dance studio with Inari One, watching
her rehearsal.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hm... I just can't get into it.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Don't be silly! When it's festival time, I'm all
about goin' big—dancin', haulin' stuff, and stirrin'
up the crowd!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm just not really into shufflin' 'round in small and
cramped places, ya know?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
If this was the real thing, I'd be gettin' all fired up
along with the audience.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But no point grumblin'. Gotta put in the effort
behind the scenes, too!
choice_data_list: Want me to get you fired up?
Want me to get you fired up?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Huh? Do ya even got what it takes?
choice_data_list: Behold the classy maiden of glorious Edo. ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh! That's me, the one and only great Inari! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Wahoo! Wahoo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! Wh-whoa, my body's movin' to the beat
without me even thinkin' about it! You're good!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right, that's the stuff! Keep hypin' me up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One appears to be fired up and ready to go.
Now, it's time to kick things up a notch.
choice_data_list: Time to bring in some backup!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One appears to be fired up and ready to go.
Now, it's time to kick things up a notch.
choice_data_list: Time to bring in some backup!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Sounds good! Who're ya bringin'?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Heya! It's me, Bamboo Memory, reporting for
duty to cheer on Inari!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Go, go! Inari! Fight on! Fight!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: O-oi, Bamboo! Aren't ya missin' the whole point?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Fight ON! Fight ON! Inari is number ONE! She's
the best in all JAPAN!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Not gettin' through to her. She's a burnin' ball
of energy like always.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Meh... I'm gettin' waaay too wrapped up in the
details. Lemme borrow that vigor and bust out my
signature dance moves!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, Inari One happily dances her heart out
until she's drenched in sweat!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa-ho! You're pretty gutsy! All right, gimme a
good beat to work with!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I borrow a drum from the storage shed.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get this show on the road!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whoa?! You've got some skills with those sticks!
My body's movin' to the beat without me thinkin'
about it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah, yeah, here we go! ♪ Wahoo, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One dances up a storm and ends up being
extremely satisfied with her rehearsal.
